name: chr3R_centromere
description: Drosophila melanogaster centromere/pericentric heterochromatin block: chr3R proximal heterochromatin h51-h58. Dodeca-satellite peak is the diagnostic marker for the chr3 centromere.. Drosophila centromeres are built from heterogeneous islands of satellites (359-bp, dodeca, AAGAG, AATAT) interspersed with retrotransposon insertions; no canonical higher-order alpha-satellite-like structure. Most of the proximal heterochromatin is assembled only as 'Het' contigs in BDGP6.46, not anchored to the euchromatic arm assembly.
expected_copy_count: mostly satellite tandem repeats + dispersed TEs; centromere proper is ~420 kb of complex DNA (Sun et al. 2003)
